زركونيا كاملة

In-House Technology

Our CAD/CAM Machines

معدات الحفر والتصنيم الرقمي لدينا

Precision milling · 5-axis technology · Same-day production
CAD/CAM
15
Redon Hybrid Full
ماكينة حفر الهايبريد ريدون
  • Mills zirconia, e.max, PMMA, wax & composites in one unit
  • Hybrid milling + grinding technology for superior precision
  • Full-arch restorations with minimal material waste
  • Integrated touchscreen workflow — fast, chairside-ready results
  • Compatible with all major CAD/CAM design software
In-House CAD/CAM
CAD/CAM
16
Roland DWX-52DCi
رولاند 5 محاور — تغيير ديسك أوتوماتيك
  • 5-axis simultaneous milling for complex anatomical forms
  • Automatic disc changer — uninterrupted multi-block production
  • Ultra-smooth surface finish, reduces sintering & polishing time
  • Compatible with zirconia, PMMA, wax, glass-ceramic & more
  • Proven Roland DG reliability — industry benchmark since day one
